stories.story: OMA detects current OS (macOS, Linux, Windows/WSL)
acceptance_criteria: OS detection function exists in src/utils.ts that returns 'macos', 'linux', or 'wsl'
On Windows with WSL: detectOs() returns 'wsl' (not 'windows' - pure Windows not supported)
Unit tests pass for the new OS detection
stories.verified: detectOs() added to src/utils.ts, returns OmaOs type, TypeScript compiles, 309 tests pass

stories.story: Short aliases for all commands (/ask, /ultraqa, etc.)
acceptance_criteria: Command files with short names exist: ask.md, ultraqa.md, ralph.md, team.md, plan.md, doctor.md, setup.md, cancel.md, hud.md, status.md, help.md, ccg.md, deepinit.md, deslop.md, interview.md, learner.md, mcp-setup.md, note.md, notifications.md, ralplan.md, release.md, research.md, science.md, session.md, skill.md, trace.md, visual-verdict.md, writer-memory.md
Each short-alias command is a copy of the corresponding oma-* command with updated name frontmatter
All original oma-* commands remain intact
stories.verified: 30 short-alias files created (ask, ultraqa, ralph, team, etc.), original oma-* files intact

stories.story: List all skills command (/skills or similar)
acceptance_criteria: New command file skills.md exists at plugins/oma/commands/oma-skills.md
Lists all available OMA skills from the skills/ directory
stories.verified: oma-skills.md created with 26 skills table and command aliases section, TypeScript compiles
